additives.name: Curcumin
additives.notes: Natural yellow colour from turmeric. Generally well-tolerated.

additives.name: Tartrazine
additives.notes: Artificial yellow dye. Subject to ongoing consumer discussion; some studies suggest sensitivity in certain individuals.

additives.name: Sunset Yellow FCF
additives.notes: Artificial orange dye linked to hypersensitivity reactions in some individuals.

additives.name: Cochineal / Carmine
additives.notes: Natural red colour derived from insects. May concern some dietary groups.

additives.name: Plain Caramel
additives.notes: Widely used caramel colour. Generally considered low concern at typical levels.

additives.name: Sulfite Ammonia Caramel
additives.notes: Produced with ammonia and sulfites; some consumer preference to avoid.

additives.name: Sorbic Acid
additives.notes: Common preservative. Well-studied; generally low concern.

additives.name: Potassium Sorbate
additives.notes: Common preservative. Considered low concern.

additives.name: Sodium Benzoate
additives.notes: When combined with vitamin C, may form benzene. Some consumers prefer to avoid.

additives.name: Sulphur Dioxide
additives.notes: Can trigger reactions in sensitive individuals, particularly asthmatics.

additives.name: Sodium Nitrite
additives.notes: Used in processed meats. Some studies associate high intake with health concerns.

additives.name: Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C)
additives.notes: Natural antioxidant. No known concerns.

additives.name: Lecithins
additives.notes: Commonly derived from soy or sunflower. Generally well-tolerated.

additives.name: Carrageenan
additives.notes: Derived from red seaweed. Subject to ongoing scientific debate regarding gut health.

additives.name: Guar Gum
additives.notes: Natural thickener. Generally considered low concern.

additives.name: Xanthan Gum
additives.notes: Fermentation-derived thickener. Well-tolerated by most people.

additives.name: Sorbitol
additives.notes: Sugar alcohol. May cause digestive discomfort in high amounts.

additives.name: Diphosphates
additives.notes: Used as raising agent and emulsifier. Moderate phosphate load.

additives.name: Mono- and Diglycerides of Fatty Acids
additives.notes: Common emulsifier. Some consumers prefer to avoid synthetic emulsifiers.

additives.name: Diacetyl Tartaric Acid Esters of Mono- and Diglycerides
additives.notes: Used in bread and bakery. Some consumers prefer to avoid.

additives.name: Sodium Carbonates
additives.notes: Standard raising agent. Low concern.

additives.name: Monosodium Glutamate (MSG)
additives.notes: Widely used flavour enhancer. Some individuals report sensitivity; scientific consensus considers it safe for most.

additives.name: Disodium Guanylate
additives.notes: Often used alongside MSG to amplify savoury flavour.

additives.name: Aspartame
additives.notes: Artificial sweetener. Subject of ongoing scientific and consumer discussion. Not suitable for PKU sufferers.

additives.name: Acesulfame K
additives.notes: Artificial sweetener. Some consumers prefer to avoid.

additives.name: Sucralose
additives.notes: Chlorinated artificial sweetener. Some recent research suggests potential effects on gut microbiome at high doses.

additives.name: Steviol Glycosides
additives.notes: Derived from the stevia plant. Generally considered a natural, low-concern sweetener.

ingredients.name: Palm Oil
ingredients.description: High in saturated fat; environmental concerns around production.

ingredients.name: Modified Starch
ingredients.description: Chemically or physically modified starch used as thickener or stabiliser.

ingredients.name: High Fructose Corn Syrup
ingredients.description: Highly processed sweetener associated with high sugar intake.

ingredients.name: Yeast Extract
ingredients.description: Contains glutamates; used as a flavour booster.

products.name: Classic Potato Chips - Original
products.raw_ingredients: Potatoes, Sunflower Oil, Salt, Dextrose, Flavouring, E621 (Monosodium Glutamate), E627 (Disodium Guanylate)

products.name: Barbecue Potato Chips
products.raw_ingredients: Potatoes, Palm Oil, Salt, Sugar, Maltodextrin, Flavouring, Natural Flavouring, E621 (Monosodium Glutamate), E627, E110 (Sunset Yellow FCF), E102 (Tartrazine), E471 (Emulsifier)

products.name: Strawberry Fruit Yoghurt
products.raw_ingredients: Whole Milk, Strawberry Preparation (12%), Sugar, Skimmed Milk Powder, Modified Starch, E407 (Carrageenan), E202 (Potassium Sorbate), Citric Acid, Natural Flavouring

products.name: Plain Greek Yoghurt
products.raw_ingredients: Whole Milk, Skimmed Milk, Live Cultures (Lactobacillus bulgaricus, Streptococcus thermophilus)

products.name: Energy Boost Drink
products.raw_ingredients: Carbonated Water, Sugar, Glucose Syrup, Citric Acid, Taurine (0.4%), Caffeine (0.03%), Niacin, Pantothenic Acid, Vitamin B6, Vitamin B12, E211 (Sodium Benzoate), E951 (Aspartame), E950 (Acesulfame K), E102 (Tartrazine), E110 (Sunset Yellow FCF), Natural Flavouring

products.name: Chocolate Sandwich Biscuits
products.raw_ingredients: Wheat Flour, Sugar, Palm Oil, Cocoa Powder (6%), Glucose Syrup, Skimmed Milk Powder, Salt, Raising Agents (E500, E450), Emulsifier (E471, E472e), Flavouring, E322 (Lecithins)

products.name: Oat & Honey Biscuits
products.raw_ingredients: Oats (40%), Wheat Flour, Honey (8%), Sunflower Oil, Sugar, Salt, Sodium Bicarbonate

products.name: Chocolate Hazelnut Spread
products.raw_ingredients: Sugar, Palm Oil, Hazelnuts (13%), Skimmed Milk Powder, Cocoa (7.4%), Lecithins (E322), Vanillin

products.name: Oat & Berry Granola Bar
products.raw_ingredients: Oats (35%), Glucose Syrup, Sugar, Sunflower Oil, Dried Cranberries (8%), Honey (5%), Wheat Flour, Salt, E322 (Soy Lecithin), Natural Flavouring

products.name: Protein Bar - Chocolate
products.raw_ingredients: Soy Protein Isolate, Glucose Syrup, Palm Oil, Cocoa Powder, Modified Starch, Glycerol, Salt, Flavouring, E471 (Mono- and Diglycerides), E322 (Lecithins), E955 (Sucralose), E950 (Acesulfame K), E415 (Xanthan Gum)
